argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const ops = ['UserTweets', 'UserByScreenName']; const fallbacks = { UserTweets: '6fWQaBPK51aGyC_VC7t9GQ', UserByScreenName: 'IGgvgiOx4QZndDHuD3x9TQ' }; let scripts = performance.getEntriesByType('resource').filter(r => r.name.includes('client-web') && r.name.endsWith('.js')).map(r => r.name); if (scripts.length < 5) { for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); scripts = performance.getEntriesByType('resource').filter(r => r.name.includes('client-web') && r.name.endsWith('.js')).map(r => r.name); if (scripts.length >= 5) break; } } const queryIds = {}; for (const op of ops) { queryIds[op] = fallbacks[op]; for (const scriptUrl of scripts.slice(0, 30)) { try { const text = await (await fetch(scriptUrl)).text(); const re = new RegExp('queryId:"([A-Za-z0-9_-]+)"[^}]{0,200}operationName:"' + op + '"'); const match = text.match(re); if (match) { queryIds[op] = match[1]; break; } } catch {} } } return { queryIds }; }

async (intermediate) => { const qids = intermediate.queryIds || {}; const username = ('{{ username }}' || '').replace(/^@/, ''); if (!username) return { error: 'Username required' }; const limit = Math.min({{ limit }} || 20, 200); const ct0 = document.cookie.split(';').map(c=>c.trim()).find(c=>c.startsWith('ct0='))?.split('=')[1]; if (!ct0) return { error: 'Not logged into x.com (no ct0 cookie)' }; const bearer = 'AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAANRILgAAAAAAnNwIzUejRCOuH5E6I8xnZz4puTs%3D1Zv7ttfk8LF81IUq16cHjhLTvJu4FA33AGWWjCpTnA'; const hdrs = { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + decodeURIComponent(bearer), 'X-Csrf-Token': ct0, 'X-Twitter-Auth-Type': 'OAuth2Session', 'X-Twitter-Active-User': 'yes' }; const userFeat = JSON.stringify({ hidden_profile_subscriptions_enabled: true, rweb_tipjar_consumption_enabled: true, responsive_web_graphql_exclude_directive_enabled: true, verified_phone_label_enabled: false, subscriptions_verification_info_is_identity_verified_enabled: true, subscriptions_verification_info_verified_since_enabled: true, highlights_tweets_tab_ui_enabled: true, responsive_web_twitter_article_notes_tab_enabled: true, subscriptions_feature_can_gift_premium: true, creator_subscriptions_tweet_preview_api_enabled: true, responsive_web_graphql_skip_user_profile_image_extensions_enabled: false, responsive_web_graphql_timeline_navigation_enabled: true }); const r1 = await fetch('/i/api/graphql/' + qids.UserByScreenName + '/UserByScreenName?variables=' + encodeURIComponent(JSON.stringify({ screen_name: username, withSafetyModeUserFields: true })) + '&features=' + encodeURIComponent(userFeat), { headers: hdrs, credentials: 'include' }); if (!r1.ok) return { error: 'HTTP ' + r1.status + ' resolving user' }; const ud = await r1.json(); const userId = ud?.data?.user?.result?.rest_id; if (!userId) return { error: 'User not found: @' + username }; const tweetFeat = JSON.stringify({ rweb_video_screen_enabled: false, payments_enabled: false, profile_label_improvements_pcf_label_in_post_enabled: true, rweb_tipjar_consumption_enabled: true, verified_phone_label_enabled: false, creator_subscriptions_tweet_preview_api_enabled: true, responsive_web_graphql_timeline_navigation_enabled: true, responsive_web_graphql_skip_user_profile_image_extensions_enabled: false, premium_content_api_read_enabled: false, communities_web_enable_tweet_community_results_fetch: true, c9s_tweet_anatomy_moderator_badge_enabled: true, responsive_web_grok_analyze_button_fetch_trends_enabled: false, responsive_web_grok_analyze_post_followups_enabled: true, responsive_web_jetfuel_frame: true, responsive_web_grok_share_attachment_enabled: true, responsive_web_grok_annotations_enabled: true, articles_preview_enabled: true, responsive_web_edit_tweet_api_enabled: true, graphql_is_translatable_rweb_tweet_is_translatable_enabled: true, view_counts_everywhere_api_enabled: true, longform_notetweets_consumption_enabled: true, responsive_web_twitter_article_tweet_consumption_enabled: true, tweet_awards_web_tipping_enabled: false, content_disclosure_indicator_enabled: true, content_disclosure_ai_generated_indicator_enabled: true, responsive_web_grok_show_grok_translated_post: false, responsive_web_grok_analysis_button_from_backend: true, post_ctas_fetch_enabled: false, freedom_of_speech_not_reach_fetch_enabled: true, standardized_nudges_misinfo: true, tweet_with_visibility_results_prefer_gql_limited_actions_policy_enabled: true, longform_notetweets_rich_text_read_enabled: true, longform_notetweets_inline_media_enabled: true, responsive_web_grok_image_annotation_enabled: true, responsive_web_enhance_cards_enabled: false }); const tweets = []; const seen = new Set(); let cursor = null; for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) { const vars = { userId, count: Math.min(100, limit - tweets.length + 10), includePromotedContent: false, withQuickPromoteEligibilityTweetFields: true, withVoice: true }; if (cursor) vars.cursor = cursor; const r2 = await fetch('/i/api/graphql/' + qids.UserTweets + '/UserTweets?variables=' + encodeURIComponent(JSON.stringify(vars)) + '&features=' + encodeURIComponent(tweetFeat), { headers: hdrs, credentials: 'include' }); if (!r2.ok) { if (tweets.length === 0) return { error: 'UserTweets HTTP ' + r2.status + ' qid=' + qids.UserTweets }; break; } const d = await r2.json(); const insts = d?.data?.user?.result?.timeline_v2?.timeline?.instructions || d?.data?.user?.result?.timeline?.timeline?.instructions || []; let nextCursor = null; for (const inst of insts) { for (const entry of inst.entries || []) { if (entry.entryId?.startsWith('cursor-bottom-')) { nextCursor = entry.content?.value; continue; } const tr = entry.content?.itemContent?.tweet_results?.result; if (!tr) continue; const tw = tr.tweet || tr; if (!tw?.rest_id || seen.has(tw.rest_id)) continue; seen.add(tw.rest_id); const l = tw.legacy || {}; const u = tw.core?.user_results?.result; tweets.push({ id: tw.rest_id, author: u?.legacy?.screen_name || u?.core?.screen_name || 'unknown', created_at: l.created_at || '', is_retweet: Boolean(l.retweeted_status_result || (l.full_text || '').startsWith('RT @')), text: tw.note_tweet?.note_tweet_results?.result?.text || l.full_text || '', likes: l.favorite_count || 0, retweets: l.retweet_count || 0, replies: l.reply_count || 0, views: tw.views?.count || '0', url: 'https://x.com/' + (u?.legacy?.screen_name || u?.core?.screen_name || 'i') + '/status/' + tw.rest_id }); } } if (!nextCursor || nextCursor === cursor) break; cursor = nextCursor; } return { tweets: tweets.slice(0, limit) }; }

async (intermediate) => { if (intermediate.error) return [{ id: '', author: '', text: '', likes: 0, retweets: 0, replies: 0, views: '0', created_at: '', is_retweet: false, url: '', error: intermediate.error }]; return intermediate.tweets || []; }
